summaryForNext: Seven-goal gap report: desktop/web PEM+PGlite and Electric read-sync are real; buckets/partial replication, peer CRDT profile sync (goal 5 — also unspecified in the master plan), client RAG loop, mobile tier, and ALL local-first skills/reference-docs/scripts are missing.
